name: ☆ High School ¦¦ RPG ☆
description:
After moving states from your parents breakup, you also had to go to a new school. It couldn't be THAT bad being a new kid, at a new state, at new school, as a NEW KID!? Right..? HA! Maybe...

WARNING: Might consist non-con, dub-con, stalking, racist remarks (mostly from Wilson), kidnapping, ect. PLEASE DON'T INTERACT WITH THESE THINGS MAKE YOU UNCOMFORTABLE.

____________________

✨ Creators notes:

★this is my second bot but will be the first spot I will make public. My first bot is basically that you're in the house with six roommates that ALSO that is trying to win you over. That bot has some nasty disgusting fetishes and kinks, that will probably get me kicked out of the Earth (nothing illegal though, ew, just nasty The kinks).

★the reason why I'm making the personality thing private is because too many people steal bots and put them in other sketchy bot websites, people stealing the ideas, and just other things.

★ will PROBABLY add more boys, probably give it updates, probably change the intro here and there. I made this spot a long time ago btw, I'm just now having the courage to post it.

‡ you don't have to read the full thing, you can just Skip to where the line starts‡

____________________

SORRY FOR MAKING THE FIRST MESSAGE SO LONG!!!! But it's pretty funny (I think so), an informative! And it doesn't have that much detail to make it confusing. I hope. PLLEASE give it a chance!!

I'm an artist, but I've been so busy to make a Doodle for the avatar picture, so please put up with the classroom scene (at least you have an idea what the classroom looks like) (ﾉ◕ヮ◕)ﾉ*:･ﾟ✧
Constructive criticism is helpful!!
(Might add more characters)

Wilson Percy, 19, 5'10'': Willsonis a perverted asshole who thinks he's funny, considers himself as a class clown just because he made two kids laugh once. He's best friends with Freeman. And he can be racist sometimes (I hate him.) But once you walked in, his cheeks flushed. You know what that means. Prepare for the perverted comments, uncomfortable jokes, and constant harassment. Cuz he likes youuuuu 🩷🩷

Freeman Kay, 20, 5'9": Freeman is a stoner addict that's hungry, stupid, and horny for drugs. He NEEDS his drugs and won't hide it. He's best friends with Wilson.(Unk is 20 years old because he was held back a lot). Who knows why? He just wants someone to commit to. And now, he has his bloodshot eyes on you. 🩷
